info.title: LegiScan
info.description: Access legislative information from all 50 states and Congress using the LegiScan API.

get.description: Returns a list of sessions that are available for access in the given state abbreviation, or all sessions if no state is given.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your API key for accessing LegiScan.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: Operation to call

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Retrieve sessions for this state

get.description: Retrieves a master list of summary bill data in the specified session (id) or for the current session in a given state (state).

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your LegiScan API key.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: Fixed value of `getMasterList` required by the LegiScan API.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the legislative session

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Retrieve bill master list for the current session in the given state (use with caution).

200.description: Successful response with master list of bills

get.summary: Get raw master list of bills
get.description: Retrieve master bill list optimized for change_hash detection

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your API key for accessing LegiScan

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The LegiScan operation name

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the legislative session

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Two-letter state abbreviation (e.g., 'NY') to filter bills by state

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your API key for accessing LegiScan.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The LegiScan operation name

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Bill identifier

parameters.description: Document ID

parameters.name: key

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The LegiScan operation name

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Person ID

get.description: Retrieve results from the full text search engine (50 results). Performs a full-text search of legislation using the LegiScan engine. You can search by state abbreviation or session ID. The response includes paginated results and a change_hash to track updates.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your API key for accessing LegiScan.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The LegiScan operation name

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Use state abbreviation (e.g., 'NY') or 'ALL'. Optional if using session ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Use session_id instead of state to target a specific session.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Full-text query string to run against the search engine.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: 1 = all, 2 = current, 3 = recent, 4 = prior, or exact year > 1900.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Result page number to return.

get.summary: Get simplified search results for automated monitoring
get.description: Retrieve results from the full text search engine. 2000 results. Performs a full-text search with simplified result structure, returning up to 2000 records at a time.  This endpoint is optimized for keyword monitoring across states or sessions.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your API key for accessing LegiScan.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The LegiScan operation name

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State abbreviation (e.g. 'TX') or 'ALL' for all states. Optional if session ID is used.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Limit search to a specific session_id.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Full text query string, URL-encoded.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: 1 = all, 2 = current, 3 = recent, 4 = prior, or a year > 1900.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page of results to return (up to 2000 records per page).

get.summary: Get list of available session datasets
get.description: Retrieve list of available dataset snapshots

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your API key for accessing LegiScan.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The LegiScan operation name

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Optional state filter for datasets.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Optional year filter for datasets.

get.summary: Get dataset archive for a legislative session
get.description: Retrieve an individual dataset for a specific session_id

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your API key for accessing LegiScan.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The LegiScan operation name

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The session_id of the dataset to retrieve.

parameters.name: access_key
parameters.description: The access_key from the corresponding getDatasetList response.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Optional format of the files inside the ZIP archive. Defaults to JSON.

get.summary: Get raw ZIP dataset for a session
get.description: Returns a raw ZIP archive containing all bills, votes, and people data for a specific session. This is a binary stream suitable for file download.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your API key for accessing LegiScan.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The LegiScan operation name

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The session_id of the dataset to retrieve.

parameters.name: access_key
parameters.description: The access_key from the corresponding getDatasetList response.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Optional format for the contents of the ZIP archive (json or csv).

200.description: ZIP archive returned as binary stream

get.summary: Get people records active in a session
get.description: Retrieve list of people active in a specific session_id

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your API key for accessing LegiScan.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The LegiScan operation name.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The session_id for which to retrieve active people.

200.description: People records and session info for a given session

get.description: Retrieve list of bills sponsored by an individual people_id

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your API key for accessing LegiScan.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The LegiScan operation name.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The legislator’s people_id to retrieve sponsored bills for.

200.description: List of sponsored bills with sponsor and session metadata

get.description: Retrieve bills from GAITS monitor list

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your API key for accessing LegiScan.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The LegiScan operation name.

parameters.name: record
parameters.description: Filter to return current or archived monitors. Values: `current`, `archived`, or year (e.g., `2019`)

200.description: GAITS monitor list containing bill metadata

get.description: Retrieve bills from GAITS monitor list for change_hash detection

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your API key for accessing LegiScan.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The LegiScan operation name.

parameters.name: record
parameters.description: Filter to return current or archived monitors.  Values: `current`, `archived`, or year (e.g., `2019`)

200.description: Raw monitor list containing bill change hash data

get.summary: Modify monitor list for specified bills
get.description: Add or remove bills from monitor/ignore lists. Use monitor, remove, set as action; stance options are watch, support, oppose.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Your API key for accessing LegiScan.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The LegiScan operation name.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The action to perform:  `monitor` adds the bills,  `remove` deletes them from the list,  `set` updates the stance.

parameters.name: list
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of `bill_id` values to modify.

parameters.name: stance
parameters.description: Stance to assign to the bills - `watch`, `support`, or `oppose`.

additionalProperties.example: OK - Bill 1501580 added to monitor list with stance watch
